articles.title: H.O.T.T.O.G.O. — 3 Key Factors Influencing Heat Pump Water Heater Performance in Food Service

articles.title: High Gas Prices? No Worries, Just Use More Ethanol
articles.summary: The EPA says it will lower gas prices by raising the percentage of ethanol in gasoline to 15% and waiving clean air regulations. The post High Gas Prices? No Worries, Just Use More Ethanol appeared first on CleanTechnica .
